rules.note: Clan-locked fighting stances. Same schema as stances.json — id / category / name / prerequisite / description / effects / actions. The owning clan is referenced via clans-bundle.json -> stanceGrants[].stanceId so a stance's metadata only lives here.

stances.name: Gentle Fist Stance
stances.description: In addition to the Byakugan, the Hyuga are known for their Gentle Fist stance. The Gentle Fist is the premiere fighting style for the Hyūga clan. While in this stance you use your clan's Hijutsu ability modifier (Strength or Wisdom, per Hijutsu Flexibility) to make unarmed attacks.
effects: Your [Unarmed Damage] die becomes a d8. This becomes 2d8 at 11th level.
Your [Unarmed Damage] becomes Chakra or Necrotic which you choose when you roll damage.
Your Hijutsu gain their Eight Trigram effect.
Beginning at 7th level, when you deal chakra damage to a creature with 0 chakra, you instead deal double the result as force damage to their hit points.
Beginning at 7th level, if you do not have the Extra Attack class feature, you can attack twice while in this stance when you take the Attack action.

actionOptions.name: Gentle Fist Strike
actionOptions.description: Make an unarmed attack using your Hyūga Hijutsu casting ability modifier (Strength or Wisdom — whichever is highest, per Hijutsu Flexibility). On a hit, deal your Gentle-Fist unarmed die as Chakra or Necrotic damage (your choice). Your Hijutsu cast while in this stance also gain their Eight Trigram effect.

scaling.description: Bonus L7: if you don't have Extra Attack, you can attack twice with the Attack action while in this stance, and any chakra damage to a 0-chakra target instead deals double the result as Force to hit points.
